name: Advance America
description_short: Haltom City, TX Advance America payday loans at 3187-B Denton Hwy — quick title loans & cash advances Mon-Sat.
description_long:
Advance America is located at 3187-B Denton Hwy in Haltom City, TX, offering accessible payday and title loan services in a standalone storefront. The location is open Monday through Friday from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM, and Saturday from 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM, with Sunday closures. This Haltom City branch provides a straightforward alternative for residents needing quick cash access without the delays of traditional banking.

At the Denton Highway location in Haltom City, customers can apply for payday loans, title loans, and cash advances with minimal paperwork. The staff at this Haltom City store can be reached at +1 817-838-9351 to answer questions about loan amounts, repayment terms, and required documentation. Same-day funding may be available for approved applications.

For Haltom City residents facing unexpected expenses, this Advance America location offers a local option for short-term credit needs. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and an active checking account when visiting. Located conveniently on Denton Hwy with extended weekday hours for working shoppers.
pros: Same-day and next-day funding available for payday and installment loans
High loan amounts for title loans up to $25,000 based on vehicle value
Extended store hours including Saturday morning availability (9 a.m.–4 p.m.)
Bilingual Spanish-language support and staff at Jacksonville location
Online application option available for all loan types, no store visit required
Multiple loan products ($100–$25,000 range) to fit different emergency needs
4.9/5 customer rating across 125,459 verified reviews indicating consistent satisfaction
cons: High interest rates and fees typical of payday lending industry, not disclosed on website
Short repayment terms (2–4 weeks for payday loans) create risk of debt cycle
Title loans require vehicle ownership and title transfer, carrying repossession risk if defaulted
Requires checking account, limiting access for unbanked consumers
No pricing transparency on website; APR and fees must be obtained in-store or by phone
best_for: Consumers needing $100–$500 in cash within 1–2 days before next paycheck
Vehicle owners with poor credit needing larger loans ($2,000+) without traditional approval
Spanish-speaking consumers in Jacksonville area requiring bilingual loan support
Borrowers who value in-store convenience and staff guidance over online-only lending
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers facing immediate financial emergencies who need $100–$25,000 within 1–2 business days and have access to employment income or vehicle collateral. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans carry high costs and short terms that can trap borrowers in debt cycles; consumers should exhaust lower-cost alternatives (credit union PALs, employer advances, credit card cash advances, or borrowing from family) before using these products.
services: Payday loans ($100–$500, 2–4 week terms, online or in-store)
Installment loans ($100–$1,000, multiple payment options, online or in-store)
Title loans ($2,000–$25,000, vehicle-collateral based, online or in-store)
In-store loan processing and same-day funding
Spanish-language customer service at select locations
Customer account login and management portal
Store location finder across multiple states
Loan product education and comparison resources

meta_description: Advance America at 3187-B Denton Hwy, Haltom City, TX. Payday and title loans with same-day funding available.
